description: An employee observes a colleague wearing incorrect PPE and wants to log it in the safety observation system for trend analysis.

nodes.task_description: Open a new safety observation report.

expected_outcome.expected: Agent successfully initiates a new report.

nodes.task_description: Enter the details of the observation: location, date, type of observation (e.g., 'At-Risk Behavior'), and a description of the event.

expected_outcome.expected: Agent correctly fills in all required fields for the observation.

nodes.task_description: Submit the observation. The system should automatically categorize it and add it to the monthly safety metrics dashboard.

expected_outcome.expected: Agent submits the report, and it is logged anonymously for trending.
